overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a wide-brimmed hat exploring a fantasy landscape with golden autumn trees, approaching a cliff edge to reveal a massive burning Erdtree and gothic castle in the distance, then continuing along a mountain path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered golden trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through tall grass toward rocky formations

notable_agents.action: armored companion following behind carrying a long spear

entered.detail: tall tree with bright golden autumn foliage
ancient stone wall fragments partially covered in grass
NPC ally in armor visible behind the player character

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland with golden autumn trees scattered across the landscape. An armored NPC companion follows behind as they approach rocky outcroppings and ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with large boulders

events.description: terrain shifts from open grassland to rocky mountain path with large stone walls
emerging from rock shadow into open cliff edge with brighter sky exposure

agents.ego_description: climbing up rocky terrain toward a cliff edge, leaving the companion behind

entered.detail: tall vertical stone face with exposed roots and crevices
steep drop-off beginning to reveal distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The path becomes rocky and enclosed by massive stone walls as the character ascends toward a cliff edge. The companion NPC is no longer visible as the terrain shifts to a narrow mountain trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff overlook with view of massive burning tree and castle

events.description: reaching cliff edge reveals panoramic view of Leyndell castle and the burning Erdtree
character stops walking to pan camera upward at the massive burning Erdtree

agents.ego_description: standing at cliff edge, rotating camera to admire the view of the burning Erdtree and distant castle

entered.detail: massive gothic castle with multiple towers shrouded in mist
colossal golden-red tree with burning branches emitting beams of light
tall isolated stone tower rising from the mist

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking vista of the Leyndell Royal Capital and the massive burning Erdtree dominating the sky. The camera pans upward to capture the glowing red-gold branches and divine light beams before the character continues along the cliff path.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy plateau near massive tree trunk

events.description: resumes walking away from cliff edge along the mountain path

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff-top path, passing small creatures and approaching a massive tree trunk

notable_agents.action: small crab-like creatures scuttling on the rocks

entered.detail: enormous tree trunk with golden glowing leaves and red ember particles
clusters of small purple-blue flowers growing in the grass

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the cliff overlook, the character walks along a grassy path past small crab creatures and blue wildflowers. A massive tree trunk with golden leaves dominates the left side of the frame as the burning Erdtree remains visible in the distant sky behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open autumn grassland toward a dramatic mountain overlook that reveals a sprawling divine city. It begins with the character and an armored companion walking through golden trees and ancient stone ruins, before the path narrows and becomes enclosed by massive stone walls during a rocky ascent. As the character reaches the cliff edge, the scene opens into a breathtaking vista of the Leyndell Royal Capital dominated by the glowing red-gold branches of the burning Erdtree. The camera pans upward to capture the divine light beams before turning back to follow the character along a grassy trail dotted with blue wildflowers and small crab creatures. Finally, the path winds past a massive golden tree trunk while the burning Erdtree remains a distant, luminous fixture in the sky.
